info.longBusinessSummary: Texas Mineral Resources Corp. acquires, explores, and develops mineral properties in the United States. Its flagship property is the Round Top rare earths project covering an area of 950 acres and prospecting permits covering 9,345 acres located in Hudspeth County, Texas. The company was formerly known as Texas Rare Earth Resources Corp. and changed its name to Texas Mineral Resources Corp. in March 2016. Texas Mineral Resources Corp. was incorporated in 1970 and is headquartered in Sierra Blanca, Texas.
